title: Remove yellow borders from PDF header and increase PDF text size

requirements.text: In the PDF generator utility (frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts), remove any yellow border or yellow-colored rectangle/line drawn at the top header section of the generated PDF document.

quotes: Remove yellow borders at the header of pdf.

acceptanceCriteria: The generated PDF header contains no yellow borders, outlines, or yellow-colored strokes/rectangles.
The rest of the PDF layout and content remains intact.

requirements.text: In the PDF generator utility (frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts), increase the font size for all text rendered throughout the entire PDF document — including headers, field labels, field values, section titles, and footer text — so the document is more readable.

quotes: Increase size of text for the entire pdf document

acceptanceCriteria: All text elements in the generated PDF are rendered at a larger font size than before.
The relative hierarchy between headings, labels, and body text is preserved.
No text overflows or is clipped due to the size increase.

constraints: Only modify frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts for these changes.
Do not alter any other PDF structure, data fields, or layout logic beyond what is required.
nonGoals: Changing colors or styles elsewhere in the app UI.
Adding or removing any data fields from the PDF.
